Profile

I work at the intersection of mathematics, signal processing, and machine learning, with a strong interest in probability, statistics, stochastic signal processing, and the mathematical foundations of machine learning. My recent work spans remote sensing, demographic analysis, and implicit neural representations.

Mathematical foundations of machine learningSignal processing and remote sensingDemographic modeling and AI for social systemsImplicit neural representations and restoration
Explore publications View CV Get in touch
Athulya Ratnayake Research Assistant at the Multidisciplinary AI Research Center, University of Peradeniya
Based in Kandy, Sri Lanka
Email ratnayakeathulya@gmail.com
